structural_claim: Complex systems spontaneously break symmetries to create discrete, organized structures from continuous fields

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: A continuous scalar field spontaneously breaks electroweak symmetry, creating discrete mass scales and particle properties from an initially symmetric state
Unified gauge symmetry spontaneously breaks into distinct electromagnetic and weak forces
Continuous rotating flow spontaneously breaks axial symmetry to create discrete vortex structures
Uniform thermal field spontaneously breaks translational symmetry to create discrete convection cells
